Answer options for overview.sponsor

  • https://mitre.org/fhir/space-health/CodeSystem/nasa-mrid-sponsor-cs#medical-operations ("Medical Operations")

Answer options for equipment-item.device-type

  • https://mitre.org/fhir/space-health/CodeSystem/nasa-medical-hardware-cs#12-lead-ecg ("12-Lead ECG Machine")
  • https://mitre.org/fhir/space-health/CodeSystem/nasa-medical-hardware-cs#blood-pressure-monitor ("Blood Pressure Monitor")

  • Ultrasound

  • Pulse Oximeter

Answer options for calibration.status

  • Current
  • Due Soon (within 30 days)
  • Overdue
  • Not Applicable

Answer options for preventive-maintenance.tasks-completed

  • Visual inspection
  • Cleaning
  • Battery check/replacement
  • Consumables replacement
  • Functional verification
  • Software update

Answer options for functionality-status.condition

  • Excellent
  • Good
  • Fair - Minor issues
  • Poor - Needs repair
  • Non-functional

  • https://mitre.org/fhir/space-health/CodeSystem/nasa-data-archive-cs#meme ("Medical Equipment Management Environment")

extension.valueString: The astronaut/crewmember subject of this medical requirement

name: MR008LMedicalHardwareMaintenance
title: MR008L Medical Hardware Maintenance
description: NASA Medical Requirements Integration Document for medical hardware maintenance. Tracks calibration schedules, preventive maintenance, and equipment functionality verification.
purpose: Track calibration and maintenance of medical equipment to ensure proper function and reliability.
copyright: NASA Johnson Space Center - Medical Requirements Integration Documents (MRIDs) JSC28913

initial.valueString: Track calibration schedules, preventive maintenance, and equipment functionality.
